sa:
  Welcome to Sysinfocus Automation Tools - Version: 0.0.0.3-beta+eb73f152497f3a7e178c2f2ffbf4d5c834600796
  A comprehensive scaffolder for .NET Minimal API and Blazor WebAssembly Standalone
  projects with incremental feature addition using DTOs from the shared project.
  GitHub repo: https://github.com/sysinfocus/sa-generated-solution

Usage:
  sa [options] [command]

Options:
  --version               Show version information

Commands:
  new <name> <database>   Creates new solution in the current directory with <name> as namespace
                          for eg: <name> = Demo, <database> is optional and by default uses Sqlite
                          or enter one among [SqlServer / MySql / Oracle / PostgreSQL / MongoDB]

  add <name> <dto>        Creates new feature with <name> using <dto> from shared project DTO folder
                          for eg: <name> = Employees, <dto> = EmployeeDto (this file should exists)

  migrate <name>          Creates new migration with <name> in the data project folder
                          for eg: <name> = Initial, Note: avoid spaces in between

  update                  Updates database with existing migrations in the data project folder

  run                     Run API and UI projects from console
